purpose: Plan safe 2001-2016 ParlParse import batches without fetching, importing, or merging data in this issue.

dedupe_rule.note: Do not merge rows with duplicate keys until a review step explains the duplicate.

future_merge_rules: Preserve Commons Votes API rows unchanged.
Keep ParlParse rows marked as source_system: parlparse.
Do not claim full-career coverage until 1983-2001 is solved or clearly excluded.
Keep each row traceable to a source XML URL and division ID.
Do not infer human political meaning from vote titles.
not_in_scope: No merge into the main MP vote index in v1.9.
No raw XML publishing in v1.9.
